subject: biology
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.33
question_html:
How does auxin exert its effect on plant cells?

A. Acts directly on the cell wall, causing expansion

B. Binds to a receptor resulting in expression of genes

C. Causes the vacuole to absorb water and expand the cell

D. Causes the cell to undergo cell division
examiners_html: Only 42 % of candidates were able to pick out how auxin exerts its effects on plant cells and all the four answers attracted significant numbers of candidates, suggesting a widespread lack of knowledge of this aspect of plant physiology.
